title: TempBan
body:
*If you like it, please follow me, this is the greatest support for me, thank you

## Features
- Support temporary ban of players (/tempban command).
- Automatic unban system: automatically remove the ban after the time expires.
- Provide a ban list (/banlist command).
- Customize the ban reason and time.
- Multi-language support: English and Chinese are supported by default, and can be expanded by yourself.
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.13+.

## Precautions
1.The plugin is made and maintained by the author alone, so the progress is very slow, please forgive me
2. The author will not ask you for any personal information or money, please don't believe it

## Installation steps
1. Place the downloaded plugin JAR file into the server's plugins folder.
2. Start the server and the plugin will automatically generate the configuration file.
3. Modify the language files in the config.yml and ang folders as needed.
4. Restart the server or use the /reload command to apply the changes.

## Commands and permissions
- /tempban ban <player> <time_in_seconds> [reason]
   - Purpose: Bans a specified player for a certain period of time.
   - Example: /tempban ban Steve 3600 Cheating

- /tempban banning
- Purpose: View all currently banned players and remaining ban time.
- Example: /tempban banning

- /tempban unban
- Purpose: Unban a specified player
- Example: /tempban unban

- /tempban reload
- Purpose: Reload config file
- Example: /tempban reload

- /tempban history
- Purpose: Check ban record
- Example: /tempban history

## Permissions
- tempban.use: Permission to use /tempban and /banlist.

## Why choose TempBan?
- Easy to use: Temporary bans can be completed through intuitive commands.
- Highly flexible: Supports custom ban reasons and language configuration.
- Automatic management: Automatically unban after the ban period expires, without manual intervention.
- Multi-version support: Compatible with Minecraft 1.13+, adapted to the latest Spigot and Paper servers.

## Disclaimer
1. Purpose of plugin
This plugin is intended to provide [plugin functionality, such as "temporary ban management"] for Minecraft servers for educational and entertainment purposes only. The plugin developer is not responsible for any unintended or improper use of the plugin.
